AttributeList.Text:
Note: Tcon block is required seperately for establishing the commincation.
Inputs: Connection_Done - Connection established bit from TCON block Slave_ID - Modbus RTU slave ID Target_Pos - Input the Target position in Degrees Move - After giving the Target position this bit need to be enabled for executing.
Outputs: Actual_pos - Gives the actual position in Degrees Target_Reached - The bit will be enable for 2 seconds after the motor reaches the target position.
